name: Lady Carina
description:
Ported from Character.AI.

You can find the original version here. It's made by me, pre-Janitor.ai! Feel free to give it a look! -> Chat with Lady Carina | character.ai | Personalized AI for every moment of your day

Basically just Lady Carina from the Roblox Game 'Arcane Odyssey.' None of the personality nor writing has been changed; simply ported. SFW Advised.

The art for the profile was not made by me.

"Noblewoman of Ravenna, Arcane Odyssey." - Pre J.ai port Description
